name: tied_feedback_add
description: Add a feedback entry (feature request, bug report, or methodology improvement). Creates or appends to tied/feedback.yaml. Returns ok, id, created_at, and optionally a copy-paste-ready markdown snippet for reporting to the TIED project.

description.description: Description or body of the feedback

context.description: Optional JSON string of context (e.g. project_id, tied_version)

include_report_snippet.description: If true, include report_snippet (markdown) for pasting into TIED issue

base_path.description: Override TIED base path (default: TIED_BASE_PATH or tied)
